faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: All our digital tools are cloud-based and require no installation. After creating your account, you can access them instantly through your web browser.
faq.a2: Yes, all your data is protected with 256-bit SSL encryption and regularly backed up. We comply with GDPR standards.
faq.a3: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. After cancellation, you can continue using our services until the end of the current period.
faq.a4: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all our products. No credit card required.
faq.a5: Our enterprise packages include priority support, custom training and consulting services. Contact us for details.
